# Project Milestones

## M0 — Foundation

- Repository structure
- Vision and brand documents
- Design system
- Contribution and security policies
- Validation workflow

## M1 — Website MVP

- `maxpost-core` MVP
- `maxpost-theme` MVP
- Software catalogue
- Software detail page
- Media Library integration
- Responsive homepage

## M2 — Platform API

- Public software API
- What's New endpoint
- Recommendations endpoint
- Application configuration endpoint
- Caching and versioning

## M3 — First Utility

- MP Folder Creator
- Shared desktop UI foundation
- Update checking
- Website landing page
- Signed release and checksum

## M4 — Multilingual Release

- English default
- Ukrainian
- Russian
- Spanish
- Portuguese
- Localized website and desktop UI

## M5 — Sustainable Monetization

- Internal cross-promotion
- Clearly marked partner placements
- Donation support
- Privacy-safe click measurement
- Monetization review against MaxPost principles

Milestones are outcome-based. A milestone closes only when its acceptance criteria are met, not when a date arrives.
